evidence_quotes.quote: to stop cutting off access to games customers have already payed for.
The initiative asks for developers to leave those games in a playable state after support ends.

paragraphs.text: I would like to show my support to this initiative and would like to suggest that this initiative should include the goals of the Stop Killing Games initiative, which asks for videogame publishers to stop cutting off access to games customers have already payed for. This mostly concerns game with some type of online component. The initiative asks for developers to leave those games in a playable state after support ends. This would make it so people can still play the games they've purchased even after official support ends.
